_comment: Single source of truth for version pins, ports, paths, and defaults shared across the npm and Docker install paths. Read by scripts/dev-safe.mjs, scripts/dev-with-automation.mjs, docker/entrypoint.sh (via generated defaults.env), and .github/workflows/docker.yml.
_agentServerGitRefComment: Set to pin the dev agent-server to a specific software-agent-sdk commit/branch. Takes precedence over versions.agentServer when present. Use this to track an unreleased SDK PR; clear it (or remove the key) once that PR is merged + released. Current pin: software-agent-sdk PR #3347 (commit 235fed007c3c49841d34a92fb4b16d8877d6d82e) — surfaces ConversationInfo.current_model_name + .current_model_id, which this UI now renders in the conversation chip.
